remaining_tasks.name: Manual deploy: upload dist.zip and run deploy.php

blockers.description: No FTP/SSH password available in this environment; SSH key was rejected by hostiman server.
blockers.workaround: User will upload dist.zip manually and call deploy.php.

human_actions_pending.action: Deploy dist.zip via https://sunlife-photo.ru/deploy.php?key=sunlife2025deploy, then Ctrl+F5 to verify (forms, Syktyvkar, partnership map)
human_actions_pending.context: dist.zip contains form handler fixes (curl_multi + TLS), content edits, Syktyvkar, partnership map section, map cache-bust.

human_actions_pending.action: Fill SMTP_PASS (mail.ru app password) in api/config.local.php on server
human_actions_pending.context: Email channel currently fails (placeholder password). Without it forms only reach Telegram. Optional: revoke exposed BOT_TOKEN at @BotFather afterwards.

decisions.decision: Exclude images/gallery from dist.zip for this deploy.
decisions.rationale: Gallery files are already on the server and were only optimized, not renamed. Including them would make the archive ~47 MB and slow FTP upload unnecessarily.

decisions.decision: Delete original JPG/PNG files that have WebP equivalents.
decisions.rationale: All code references use WebP versions; originals were unused and consumed ~50 MB in the repo.

decisions.decision: Resize gallery images to 1600px on the long edge and encode at WebP quality 75.
decisions.rationale: Reduced gallery from 87 MB to 36 MB with acceptable visual quality; large originals are not needed for web display.

next_action: Deploy fresh dist.zip (form fixes, content, Syktyvkar, partnership map) via deploy.php, then set SMTP_PASS in api/config.local.php on server and verify email channel. Next todos: todo-011 (privacy), todo-005 (analytics, needs Metrica ID), cache headers via hostiman panel.
context_notes: 2026-07-20: Telegram form delivery WORKS (verified by user). Two proxy-pool bugs fixed (curl_multi handle map, TLS-intercepting proxy certs). config.local.php created on server with BOT_TOKEN/CHAT_ID/proxy (HTTP 198.64.244.136:59100) — but SMTP_PASS still placeholder, email channel down until filled. BOT_TOKEN exposed in chat — recommend /revoke after setup. Content edits: 10-14d delivery, 10k births, exp 3-5y, Rahmatullin into partner testimonials slider, minister block + minzdrav grid removed, office address removed everywhere. Syktyvkar added to map (+komi region highlight, geography.json); cache-bust ?v= on russia-map.svg (nginx 24h static cache). Partnership page: Before/After renamed to Ремонт помещений, map section added before pricing. Latest commits: 25c5ac7, 9a99e64, 0e672c3, a2b786f, 176afe9. Build clean, dist.zip fresh.
